title: SASC Chairman Roger Wicker and Ranking M...
description: WASHINGTON, DC—U.S. Senators Roger Wicker, R-Miss, and Jack Reed, D-RI, Chairman and Ranking Member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, today...
text:
WASHINGTON, DC—U.S. Senators Roger Wicker, R-Miss, and Jack Reed, D-RI, Chairman and Ranking Member of the Senate Armed Services Committee, today announced that they have filed S. 2296, the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2026 (NDAA).
Read the FY26 NDAA Bill Language.
Read the FY26 NDAA Executive Summary.
###
